member.name: T:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData
member.summary: Contains IDs related to the user.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData.IdProbGlobal
member.summary: Probabilistic 51Did, unique across all callers from the same device and network.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData.IdProbLic
member.summary: Probabilistic 51Did, unique only across the caller’s license key.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData.IdRandGlobal
member.summary: Random 51Did carrying a server-generated GUID, unique across all callers.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData.IdRandLic
member.summary: Random 51Did carrying a server-generated GUID, scoped to the caller’s license key.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData.IdHemGlobal
member.summary: Hashed-email 51Did derived from the supplied email and salt, unique across all callers.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Did.Core.Data.I51DidData.IdHemLic
member.summary: Hashed-email 51Did derived from the supplied email and salt, scoped to the caller’s license key.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Did.Core.FlowElements.DidBaseEnginePropertiesBuilder
member.summary: Helper class that builds metadata for both OnPremise and Cloud versions of 51Did engine.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Did.Core.FlowElements.DidBaseEnginePropertiesBuilder.BuildComponentMetaData(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FlowElements.IAspectEngine,System.Boolean)
member.param: If true, will wrap the type of properties into .
